summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FinNews V3 after P0 bug fixes. Both bugs (MongoDB projection error and Helmet title crash) are now FIXED. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: CoinGecko API rate limited (429), using fallback data
minor.impact: No functional impact - fallback ticker data works correctly

passed_tests: Article title, breadcrumb, content, featured image, author link, share button - all present
OG meta tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url) - all present and correct
Homepage with ticker, Latest News section, category sections
Navigation from homepage to article page via article card click
Admin login with credentials petar010591@gmail.com / Zvezda2023!
Admin dashboard with stats (10 articles, 7 categories, 1 team member)
XML sitemap at /api/sitemap.xml - valid XML with all URLs
Author profile page at /author/{authorId} - shows author info and 10 articles
Homepage sections API returning correct data structure
Article by slug API returning full article with OG fields and related articles
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded data (10 articles, 7 categories, 8 tags)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 bugs fixed. Article pages now render correctly with full content, OG meta tags, author links, and related articles. Backend MongoDB projection error at line 299 was fixed (changed from mixed inclusion/exclusion to exclusion-only). Frontend Helmet title crash was fixed (changed from multiple children to template literal). All 25 backend tests pass. Admin dashboard, author profiles, XML sitemap all working.

bug_1.description: MongoDB mixed projection error in get_article_by_slug causing 500 errors
bug_1.verification: API returns 200 with full article data including OG fields

bug_2.description: Frontend Helmet <title> crash - multiple children error
bug_2.verification: Article page renders correctly with proper title in browser tab
